Dhruv Dagar

Talent Acquisition Specialist

Position: Data Scientist

📍 Location: Remote
🧑‍💻 Experience: 6+ Years


---

Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced Data Scientist to design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics and machine learning solutions. This role involves working on end-to-end data science projects, handling large datasets, and delivering impactful insights to drive business decisions.


---

Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models and analytics solutions

Lead end-to-end data science projects from problem definition to production

Work with large and complex datasets to extract actionable insights

Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business needs into data solutions

Mentor junior team members and promote best practices

Build and optimize data pipelines and workflows

Present insights and model results to leadership teams

Ensure model scalability, performance, and reliability



---

Required Skills

Strong expertise in Python or R

Hands-on experience in Machine Learning, Statistical Modeling, and Predictive Analytics

Experience with libraries such as Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch

Strong knowledge of SQL and database management

Experience with data visualization tools (Tableau, Power BI, Matplotlib, Seaborn)

Good understanding of feature engineering, model tuning, and evaluation

Experience working with large-scale datasets



---

Preferred Skills

Experience with Big Data technologies (Hadoop, Spark)

Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)

Knowledge of MLOps tools (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines)

Experience in Deep Learning, NLP, or Computer Vision

Familiarity with data engineering concepts



---

📩 Interested candidates? apply now🚀

Please share your updated resume on WhatsApp +91 72918 74076
or email at Forcecraver.aditya@gmail.com to discuss further

🚀 We’re Hiring: MLOps Engineer (Remote – India)
Are you passionate about building scalable ML systems and working with cutting-edge cloud technologies? We’re looking for an experienced MLOps Engineer to join our team!

🔹 Role: MLOps Engineer
🔹 Experience: 12+ years in IT (5+ years in relevant domain)
🔹 Location: Remote (India)

💼 Key Responsibilities
✔️ Build and manage large-scale distributed ML systems
✔️ Develop and optimize automated deployment frameworks
✔️ Work with cloud platforms like AWS or Microsoft Azure
✔️ Design and manage CI/CD pipelines and software lifecycle modules
✔️ Collaborate with cross-functional teams for scalable architecture design

🛠️ Required Skills
✔ BTech in Computer Science (or equivalent)
✔ Strong experience in AWS or Microsoft Azure
✔ Expertise in Docker & containerization
✔ Hands-on experience with Machine Learning frameworks (Scikit, TensorFlow, SparkMLib, etc.)
✔ Proficiency in Python, Java, Shell, Perl, or Ruby
✔ Experience in microservices, REST APIs, and databases
✔ Strong knowledge of CI/CD tools (Jenkins, Git, Perforce)
✔ Experience in Bash scripting and Linux system optimization

⭐ Good to Have
➕ Experience with Red Hat OpenShift Service on AWS (ROSA)
➕ Exposure to Deep Learning, Computer Vision, and Recommendation Systems
➕ Architect-level experience

📩 Interested candidates, please share your updated CV along with:
✔️ Full Name (as per documents)
✔️ Strong LinkedIn profile

👉 Send your application to: niyati.anshatait@gmail.com

✨ Don’t miss this opportunity to work on advanced ML systems with a dynamic team!

G Vaishnavi

Business Analyst | Tech & Talent Connector HRBP | Driving Impact at The AI Matters

📌 Job Title: Forward Deployment Engineer – GTM AI
📍 Location:  (Remote)
💰 Rate: ₹ 2,00,000 / Month
⏳ Duration: 6–12 Months Contract
🕒 Experience: 5–10 Years


---

🧾 Role Overview

We are hiring a Forward Deployment Engineer (GTM AI) to work closely with Sales, RevOps, and Customer Success teams. This is a highly execution-driven role focused on building and deploying AI-powered solutions that directly impact revenue and business outcomes.


---

⏰ Work Timings

11:00 AM – 11:00 PM (Flexible 3–4 hour break)
Must be available for late evening client calls


---

🚀 Key Responsibilities

Design and deploy production-grade AI solutions in fast-paced sprints

Identify automation opportunities with business teams

Integrate AI systems with GTM tools (Salesforce, Gong, Outreach)

Build AI agents and workflows to improve productivity

Translate technical solutions into measurable business impact

Ensure system reliability via monitoring and quality checks



---

✅ Requirements

4+ years of experience in software/product engineering

Hands-on experience with Salesforce and GTM tools

Strong experience with AI/LLM-based workflows

Understanding of Sales, Customer Success, and GTM processes

Experience with system integrations and event-driven architecture

Strong communication and stakeholder management skills



---

⭐ Nice to Have

Experience in SalesTech / revenue-focused platforms

Exposure to AI production and automation systems

Experience building internal tools and data-driven workflows



---

🛠️ Primary Skills

Salesforce & GTM | AI/LLM | Sales | Customer Success | GTM Processes
